title: Cobbledex: Recrafted
description: An In game pokedex Made for cobblemon, No longer will you have to open another tab to find where a pokemon spawns or what its stats/abilities are.
body:
An In Game pokedex for cobblemon listing a Pokémon's type, abilities, spawn locations, and a dex entry with some info on the mon. it can be crafted with 4 iron, a glass pane, 2 Redstone dust, a Redstone block, and a repeater, heavily referencing the old pixelmon pokedex recipe

Long gone are the days of having to open google or another browser to find a Pokémon's abilities or spawning location
